name: Rogz Dog ginz-Treat Ball 4.9cm – Pink Small
shortDescription: Buy the Rogz Grinz Small Treat Ball a safe, floating, treat-dispensing toy for small dogs. Durable, fun, and perfect for fetch, training, and enrichment.
description: Bring more fun and enrichment to your dog’s playtime with the Rogz Grinz Small Treat Ball a premium, durable toy engineered for small dogs and puppies. This lightweight ball features a unique grinning teeth pattern, adding humor to every game while offering practical functionality for training and reward-based play. Product Highlights Compact & Lightweight Designed for small dogs with a 4.9cm size and a comfortable weight that’s easy to fetch, carry, and chase. High-Quality SEBS/TPR Build Made from strong, non-toxic materials that are gentle on teeth but resilient enough for moderate chewers. Built-In Treat Cavity Insert treats into the internal chamber to encourage longer play sessions, mental stimulation, and rewarding interaction. Bounce & Float Functionality Soft bounce makes it safe indoors, while its floating ability offers exciting water-based fun. Easy Maintenance Freezer- and dishwasher-safe for effortless cleaning or creating frozen treat challenges. Safe for Play CE-certified and crafted from dog-safe materials for secure everyday use. Perfect for Training, Play & Enrichment Whether you’re teaching fetch, managing boredom, or encouraging healthy exercise, the Rogz Grinz Treat Ball is a reliable choice. Its versatility makes it ideal for indoor play, outdoor adventures, and water activities.
